Home > @imqueue/rpc > IMQLock > locked

IMQLock.locked() method

Returns true if the given key is locked, false otherwise.

Signature:

static locked(key: string): boolean;

Parameters

Parameter

Type

Description

key

string

key to check the lock state for

Returns:

boolean

{boolean}
